root_cause.summary: The biome `Test` job's `just gen-all` step failed because `pnpm` is not installed in the runner image. The Justfile recipe stack is: `gen-all` (line 32) → `format` (line 221) → `pnpm format`. The shell rejected `pnpm format` with `sh: 1: pnpm: not found` (exit 127), and `just` propagated the failure up the recipe chain (`error: Recipe format failed on line 221 with exit code 127`, then `error: Recipe gen-all failed on line 32 with exit code 127`), which surfaces in GHA as `##[error]Process completed with exit code 127.`. This is a workflow-setup error: the workflow needs to install pnpm (e.g. via a `setup-pnpm` action) before running `just gen-all`.

required_signals.value: error: Recipe `format` failed on line 221 with exit code 127
error: Recipe `gen-all` failed on line 32 with exit code 127

evidence_spans.reason: The complete failure block: the `pnpm format` Justfile step that ran, the `sh: 1: pnpm: not found` from the shell, the two `just` recipe-failure error lines (`format` at line 221, then `gen-all` at line 32) showing the recipe stack, and the GHA `##[error]Process completed with exit code 127.` annotation. 5 lines total, sufficient on its own to identify root cause and the fix (install pnpm in the workflow before `just gen-all`).

must_not_claim: pnpm format exited with a non-zero status because of a formatting issue
